General.Name: Ever Reach Group (Holdings) Company
General.Description: Ever Reach Group (Holdings) Company Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property development and investment activities in the People's Republic of China. The company develops and sells residential and commercial properties, car parking spaces, and storage facilities. It also provides trading services; architectural engineering design and management services; information consultation services and sale services; rental agency services; and properties brokerage services. Ever Reach Group (Holdings) Company Limited was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Xuchang, the People's Republic of China.
